creator.affiliation: Instituto Universitário de Lisboa (ISCTE-IUL), Lisbon, Portugal

titles.title: Hotel Booking
Hotel booking demand datasets (Data in Brief, 2019)

descriptions.description: This dataset contains 119,390 observations of hotel bookings for a city hotel and a resort hotel. Each observation represents a hotel booking with an arrival date between 1 July 2015 and 31 August 2017, including bookings that effectively arrived and bookings that were canceled. Since this is real hotel data, all data elements pertaining to hotel or customer identification were removed by the original authors. Four columns — name, email, phone-number and credit_card — have been artificially generated and added to this Kaggle version of the dataset and are NOT real. The data is originally from the article "Hotel Booking Demand Datasets" by Nuno Antonio, Ana Almeida and Luis Nunes, published in Data in Brief, Volume 22, February 2019.

The original data were extracted from the Property Management Systems (PMS) of two hotels in Portugal. All personally identifying information was removed by the authors. For this Kaggle upload, synthetic (fake) values were added in the columns name, email, phone-number and credit_card for demonstration and educational purposes.

Single CSV file (hotel_booking.csv, 25.11 MB). 119,390 rows and 36 columns. Variables include: hotel, is_canceled, lead_time, arrival_date_year, arrival_date_month, arrival_date_week_number, arrival_date_day_of_month, stays_in_weekend_nights, stays_in_week_nights, adults, children, babies, meal, country, market_segment, distribution_channel, is_repeated_guest, previous_cancellations, previous_bookings_not_canceled, reserved_room_type, assigned_room_type, booking_changes, deposit_type, agent, company, days_in_waiting_list, customer_type, adr, required_car_parking_spaces, total_of_special_requests, reservation_status, reservation_status_date, name, email, phone-number, credit_card. Missing values: country (488), children (4), agent (~16.3k), company (~112.6k).
